description: Remove a Person from a Role in a Project. A successful response returns the removed Role UUID.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

parameters.name: role_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the Role in the Project.

schema.description: Schema representing the ID of a Role assigned to a Project.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Role assigned to a Project.
